paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 249 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 212 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 53 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 1 task should be active but is stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 11 days past due with 47 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **30 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $16,673 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 15 days past due with 42 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **40 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $21,046 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Charles Harris — Argyle TX:** The oldest overdue task is 43 days past due with 41 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **4 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 55 days past due with 35 total — this has been stuck for days. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $30,600 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** The oldest overdue task is 9 days past due with 22 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **16 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $51,132 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Shaan Lagisetty (CNG-20251169):** The oldest overdue task is 29 days past due with 18 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **35 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** Down to 16 overdue — making progress. Keep pushing to close them out today. **46 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 13. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **16 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 53 days past due with 7 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **17 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $12,013 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** The oldest overdue task is 9 days past due with 7 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **6 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.
**Karim-Merchant:** **16 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Angel Pacheco:** Carrying 76 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Jeff:** Carrying 49 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.

247 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **229 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 35 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$102,744 in payments going out this week** across 54 tasks — make sure funds are available. $55,034 expected in from 4 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496) and Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199) — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 76. This needs to turn around today.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 47 overdue (oldest: 11d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **30 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 40 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 22 overdue (oldest: 9d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **16 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 18 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 7 overdue (oldest: 9d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **6 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
